abilities.description: When you make a move using the shipbreaker to cut through a barrier (such as a ship's hull, a vehicle's armor, or a wall), add +1. Then, you may @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.93d2d69b7e2b85e1]{Lose Momentum} (-2) to reroll one challenge die.

The shipbreaker features aturbo. When you make a move using this tool, you may leverage its turbo after rolling. If you do, improve a miss to a weak hit, or a weak hit to a strong hit, but @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.905205c073b09eac]{Endure Harm} (-1).

The shipbreaker may detect valuable materials. When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.367804b98f30d5f4]{Explore a Waypoint} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.703964b8d02355b8]{Resupply} using this tool and score a strong hit with a 6 on your action die, you find a highly valuable resource; take +1 momentum. Then, you may choose to continue to look for more. If you do, reroll your action die and one challenge die. Resolve the move as a new outcome.

system.description: An industrial tool to salvage vessels and break through thick barriers.
